name: California Check Cashing Stores
description_short: San Mateo, CA's California Check Cashing Stores on S Norfolk St offers fast check cashing and financial services with convenient weekday evening hours.
description_long:
California Check Cashing Stores is located at 610 S Norfolk St in San Mateo, CA, a convenient standalone location on the city's south side. The store operates Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, and Saturday 10 AM to 4 PM, making it accessible for check cashing during typical business hours and weekend mornings. The San Mateo location is easy to reach and provides a reliable option for residents and workers in the neighborhood.

At this San Mateo location, California Check Cashing Stores provides fast check cashing services for personal and business checks. You can reach the store directly at +1 650-548-4700 to ask about current services, fees, or to verify availability before your visit.

If you're a San Mateo resident needing quick check cashing, bring your valid ID and the check you want to cash. California Check Cashing Stores has been serving the community with straightforward check cashing for years.
address: 610 S Norfolk St, San Mateo, CA 94401

company_info.headquarters: 610 S Norfolk St, San Mateo, CA 94401

pros: Multiple San Francisco locations including Mission Street and Market Street branches
Western Union money transfers and money orders available in-store
Tax preparation services offered alongside financial products
Online loan application start option reduces in-store wait time
Weekday hours extend to 7:00 PM, accommodating working-hour customers
Green Dot Visa Debit Cards and reloadable debit cards available for unbanked consumers
Payroll advances available both in-store and online
cons: Loan amounts capped at $250, which is very limited for genuine emergencies
Rates and fees not published online — customers must visit store for details
Closed Sundays with reduced Saturday hours (10AM-4PM only)
Site's own disclaimer warns small-dollar loans can be expensive over time
Not all services guaranteed at every location
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals who cannot access traditional bank services
Workers needing a small payroll advance of up to $250 before payday
Consumers needing in-person bill payment or Western Union money transfers
Low-income filers needing walk-in tax preparation assistance
diagnosis: California Check Cashing Stores is best for unbanked San Francisco residents who need check cashing, small cash advances, or in-person money transfer services with extended weekday hours. The main caveat is that loan amounts are capped at $250 and the company does not disclose its rates online, so cost-conscious borrowers should request fee schedules in-store before committing.
services: Email and SMS alerts and offers
meta_description: California Check Cashing Stores at 610 S Norfolk St, San Mateo, CA. Fast check cashing with extended weekday hours until 7 PM.
